games.name: Scrapwing
games.author: austinio7116
games.desc: An R-Type roguelike crossed with a gravity cave-flyer: thrust through five procedurally generated alien biomes — caverns, flesh hives, glaciers, spore pits and magma forges — where every enemy fires the weapon gene it carries and drops it when it shatters into its own pixels. Splice salvage at the Fusion Bench (with a live-fire preview of the result) across 8 firing patterns, 6 elements and stacking mods. Every third sector a guardian dreadnought seals the warp gate behind a randomized attack deck; drone wingmen, chrono mines, bomb bays and a recharging shield turn the tide. 417 enemy ships. 78 bosses. One life.

games.name: Wormote
games.author: austinio7116
games.desc: A Liero-style cave deathmatch: every pixel of dirt is destructible, and the ninja rope swings you through the wreckage. Pick any 5 of 20 weapons — minigun, gauss, cluster bombs, napalm, larpa, dirtball, laser, doomsday — then out-dig, out-swing and out-shoot bots that tunnel after you, blast through walls at you, and rope around the caves. Blood stains the dirt, dirtballs bury worms alive, and rock yields only to a worm's teeth. 2P LINK duels a friend over cable or internet.

games.name: RedMote
games.author: austinio7116
games.desc: A comically tiny but fully functional Red Alert-style RTS: units are about six pixels each, so whole armies clash on the 128-pixel screen. The full tech tree is here — power plants, ore refineries with harvesters, war factories, radar, helipads and tesla coils — behind fog of war and a hold-to-open radar minimap, with nine unit types across six weapon classes that trade blows through a real armour/damage table. Build the base from a paused card menu, queue and batch production, auto-paved roads knitting it together, and rally your selection into formation across procedurally generated maps. A nine-mission teaching campaign runs from an army-only opener to a full-tech finale; a separate skirmish mode lets you dial in army size, base level, funds and enemy difficulty. 2P LINK: a full lockstep 1v1 over the link — build, tech and battle against a friend over USB, LAN or internet.

games.name: WolfMote
games.author: austinio7116
games.desc: A Wolfenstein-style FPS crossed with a roguelike: eight procedurally generated floors of packed rooms, push-wall secrets and locked vaults. Nine weapons from silent knife to plasma rifle — including a fireball-lobbing flamethrower — drop as weighted random loot. 2P DEATHMATCH: first to ten frags in a shared dungeon, weapons respawning — and when you die you drop your whole arsenal as a loot bag either player can claim.

games.name: Grand Thumb Auto
games.author: austinio7116
games.desc: A GTA-1-style top-down city — and every new game generates a brand-new one: fresh rivers, bridges, districts and parks each run. Steal cars, run missions from payphones, outdrive the police, and watch your wanted level climb until the army sends a tank (now hidden somewhere quiet). Real 2D rigid-body driving with tyre grip and traffic that fights back. 2P DEATHMATCH: same generated city on both units, shared traffic to steal, weapon caches, first to ten.

games.name: Galaxy Swarm
games.author: austinio7116
games.desc: A remake of the Android original with its actual 3D models: endless waves of fighters, tridents, corvettes and spinning UFOs over a scrolling galaxy. Nine power-ups build your arsenal from twin lasers to a nine-gun spread with homing rockets and companion drones — and every tenth wave a boss arrives.

games.name: Thumbalaga
games.author: austinio7116
games.desc: A Galaga-inspired fixed shooter: waves swoop in formation, dive-bomb, and capture your fighter. Chain perfect stages, earn double ships, and chase the high score.

games.name: ThumbAtro
games.author: austinio7116
games.desc: A Balatro-style deckbuilder: play poker hands to hit rising blinds, then warp your deck with jokers, planet cards and tarot upgrades. One more ante is always a mistake — take it anyway.

games.name: ThumbyRogue
games.author: austinio7116
games.desc: Descend into The Crypt: a raycast first-person roguelike with procedural floors, monsters, loot and permadeath. Every run is a new dungeon.

games.name: ThumbyCraft
games.author: austinio7116
games.desc: A pocket voxel world: dig, gather, craft tools and build in a fully destructible landscape with caves, torches and chests — a complete survival loop on a 128-pixel screen. Best played directly on ThumbyOne, where the full-feature build has its own dedicated slot.

games.name: ThumbyCue
games.author: austinio7116
games.desc: Full 3D cue sports: snooker and pool with real ball physics, spin, numbered and striped balls, soft shadows and an aiming ghost ball. Play the AI, pass-the-device — or 2P LINK a friend across the room or across the world.

games.name: Indemnity Run
games.author: austinio7116
games.desc: A 20,000-line space epic: free flight, dogfights, trading and missions across a whole galaxy. Dock at stations, outfit your ship with lasers, missiles and shields, and make your fortune — or lose it. PVP ARENA: bring your SAVED ship and loadout to a 1v1 dogfight against a friend's.

games.name: DeepThumb
games.author: austinio7116
games.desc: A faithful port of the TinyCircuits DeepThumb chess game with a proper engine behind it — play the classic sprite board, or flip to a 3D Staunton set with a free orbiting camera. 2P LINK plays a friend over cable or internet; the handshake deals the colours.

games.name: MotoKart
games.author: austinio7116
games.desc: Mode-7-style kart racing: three-lap circuits with kerbs, checkered gates and rival karts — with the full item game: mushrooms, bananas, green and red shells, stars, bullets, lightning. 2P LINK races a friend head-to-head, items and all.

games.name: NightMote
games.author: austinio7116
games.desc: A Vampire-Survivors-style horde game: mow down the swarm, hoover up XP, and build your weapon loadout level by level across a procedural overworld. One more run before bed.

games.name: PaperMote
games.author: austinio7116
games.desc: Paper.io on a handheld: loop back to your land to claim ground, cut rivals' trails to steal their whole base, and don't cross your own line. Five AI rivals, three modes — plus a 2P LINK territory duel, first to three KOs.

games.name: Golf
games.author: austinio7116
games.desc: A full round over rolling 3D terrain: judge the wind, shape your power and putt out. Simple to swing, hard to par.

games.name: Tanks
games.author: austinio7116
games.desc: Turn-based tank battles with fully rigged 3D tanks — tracks, turret, recoil and all. Walk your shots in before the enemy walks in theirs.

games.name: Chess
games.author: austinio7116
games.desc: Chess with baked STL Staunton pieces on a lit 3D board. A clean, complete game of the classic.

games.name: Tetris3D
games.author: austinio7116
games.desc: The falling-block classic rendered in crisp engine 3D. Ten kilobytes of pure compulsion.

games.name: Arkanoid3D
games.author: austinio7116
games.desc: A polished brick-breaker with power-ups, particles, ball trails and escalating levels — the paddle arcade staple with a 3D glow-up.

games.name: Pong3D
games.author: austinio7116
games.desc: Pong, reborn with trails and spin. First to the score wins; the AI does not blink.

games.name: Fling
games.author: austinio7116
games.desc: Angry-Birds-style fort demolition in side-view 3D: charge the fling, arc your bird into the tower, and let real rigid-body physics topple the pigs. Every fort is freshly generated.
